items.title: Looking At The Narrative For Salesforce CRM As AI And Valuation Assumptions Shift
items.description: What Is Driving the Subtle Shift in Salesforce’s Valuation Narrative? Salesforce’s fair value estimate has been nudged from about US$329.65 to about US$327.86 and the discount rate used in the analysis has been adjusted slightly from about 8.57% to about 8.53%. This small reset reflects both ongoing optimism around growth drivers like artificial intelligence and a touch more caution in how that potential is being priced. Supportive voices still point to AI, improving key performance...

items.title: There's a Rout in Tech Stocks. What's Going On?
items.description: Investor concerns about the impact of AI are growing.

items.title: AI leaders argue software will adapt – not die – but valuations are stretched
items.description: Major tech companies lost $1 trillion in a market sell-off this week, sending chills across tech industry. However, I unicorn founders believe valuations will normalize.

items.title: Salesforce, Inc. (CRM): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Salesforce, Inc. on Darius Dark Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CRM. Salesforce, Inc.’s share was trading at $227.96 as of January 28th. CRM’s trailing and forward P/E were 30.51 and 17.51 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Salesforce, Inc. items.title: PG&E Corporation, Lockheed Martin, Salesforce, and Wells Fargo Announce the Launch of EMBERPOINT LLC
items.description: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is included among the 12 Best Nuclear Energy Stocks to Buy Now On January 27, 2026, PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG), alongside Lockheed Martin, Salesforce, and Wells Fargo, announced the launch of EMBERPOINT LLC, a joint venture focused on wildfire detection, prevention, and response. The companies said EMBERPOINT will combine artificial intelligence, autonomous systems, […]
